Command: run
Scenario: web-app
Status: failed

Stages:
- run/iteration_1_generate: pass
- run/iteration_1_validate: fail

Failures:
- run/iteration_1 check=stuck command="run loop" detail="stopped due to stuck detection"
- run/iteration_1_validate check=validate command="validate" detail="validation failed"

Explainability:
- run/iteration_1 check=stuck summary="criteria check failed and requires scenario/harness inspection" action="review failure detail and criteria definition for this check"
- run/iteration_1_validate check=validate summary="criteria check failed and requires scenario/harness inspection" action="review failure detail and criteria definition for this check"
